hypothesis: If pretrained equivariant ML models (eqV2 and eSEN) are used to compute approximate MEPs and then DFT SSNEB is restarted from these ML-converged images, then the ML+VASP workflow will require fewer DFT SSNEB iterations and substantially less computational time than VASP-only NEB while yielding MEPs and transition-state energies and geometries equivalent to VASP-only results for CsPbI3 and TiO2.
